_comment: NVDA 10-for-1 forward stock split effective 2024-06-10. All BUY and SELL transactions before this date have their quantities multiplied by 10 and prices divided by 10 to match post-split share counts.
LRCX 10-for-1 forward stock split effective 2024-10-03. Only BUY transactions before this date are adjusted (dataset reconciliation — sells were already recorded post-split).
